themes.name: Executive
themes.description: Conservative, authoritative. Navy/gold palette with serif headings. Best for C-suite reports, board presentations, client deliverables.

themes.name: Technical
themes.description: Dense, modern, code-friendly. Slate/cyan palette with sans-serif headings. Best for engineering docs, architecture reviews, technical audits.

themes.name: Compliance
themes.description: Formal, print-optimized. Dark blue/teal palette with serif headings. Best for legal documents, regulatory reports, due diligence, audit findings.

themes.name: Modern
themes.description: Vibrant, contemporary, friendly. Indigo/pink palette with system UI fonts. Best for customer-facing summaries, product updates, team reports, and friendly communications.

themes.name: Minimal
themes.description: Monochrome, maximal whitespace, sharp typography. Best for design-conscious audiences, clean presentations, data-forward documents.
